# `vendor/src/`

[中文 README](./README.md)

This directory stores third-party source archives. At the moment it mainly contains the upstream Linux 0.12 source tarball consumed by `rebuild/`.

The repo does not modify upstream archives in place here. All local adaptation changes live under `rebuild/patches/linux-0.12/`. The full provenance and licensing boundary is described in [THIRD_PARTY.en.md](../../THIRD_PARTY.en.md).

## Current File

- `linux-0.12.tar.gz`
  upstream Linux 0.12 source archive
